name: Japanese & Korean Cooking
description: Recipes, techniques, and inspiration for Japanese and Korean home cooking. Heavy on ramen, karaage, bibimbap, and fermentation.

name: Rock Climbing MT
description: Climbing routes, gear reviews, training drills, and beta for Missoula-area crags including Rattlesnake and Kootenai Canyon.

name: Montana Outdoors & Hiking
description: Trail guides, trip reports, gear lists, and photos from Glacier NP, the Bitterroot, Bob Marshall Wilderness, and Missoula-area trails.

name: Pain Science & Occupational Therapy
description: Pain neuroscience education, Occupational Therapy resources, pacing strategies, and ACT-based chronic pain group management.

name: Home & Living
description: Apartment organization, minimalist living, climbing wall home builds, and functional workspace setups.

name: Trail Running Gear & Routes
description: Shoe reviews, ultralight kit, fueling, and trail running routes across the Bitterroot and Rattlesnake Wilderness.

name: Fermentation Projects
description: Shio koji, miso, kimchi, sourdough, and slow ferments. Process notes and timing logs from my kitchen.

name: Cross-Country Skiing
description: Nordic ski technique, waxing guides, and groomed and backcountry trails around Lolo Pass and Seeley Lake.

name: Hand Therapy & Upper Extremity
description: Splinting patterns, edema management, tendon glides, and HTCC exam study resources for hand therapy.

name: Houseplants & Indoor Garden
description: Care guides for pothos, monstera, ferns, and low-light apartment plants. Propagation and pest notes.

name: Cookbook Library
description: Cookbooks worth owning - Nordic, Japanese, Levantine, and the ones I cook from the most. Notes on standout recipes.

name: Indie Folk & Listening
description: Phoebe Bridgers, Big Thief, and the quieter end of the folk shelf. Album art, lyrics, and live sets.

name: REI Gear Wishlist
description: Packs, layers, trekking poles, and the gear I'm watching for the REI member sale.

name: Community Wellness Circle - Resources
description: Handouts, pacing worksheets, and participant-facing education for the chronic pain group self-management group at BRC.

name: Glacier National Park
description: Going-to-the-Sun trip planning, day hikes, larch season, and backcountry permits for Glacier NP.

name: Apartment Climbing Wall Build
description: Home woody and hangboard build ideas, hold layouts, and small-space training setups.

name: Subahru Crosstrek Setup
description: Roof box, dog bahrrier, gear organization, and Montana winter prep for the Crosstrek.

name: Weeknight Dinners
description: Fast, vegetable-forward dinners for after a long clinic day. 30 minutes or less, mostly one-pan.

name: MCWC Chronic Pain Program Brand & Product
description: Design references, dashboard inspiration, and brand mood for the Finthesiss.ai professional platform.

name: Literary Fiction Reading List
description: Novels and essay collections I'm working through. Mostly contemporary literary fiction and nature writing.
